home.heroSubtitle: ARGENIT aims to help physicians make the best diagnosis as quickly as possible with advanced biomedical imaging systems. We offer AI-powered digital platforms for pathology and cytogenetics laboratories.
home.cytoDesc: We are pioneering a new era in genetic diagnostics with automated metaphase scanning, digital karyotyping, and FISH analysis systems. Analyzing every chromosome pair with precision and speed.
home.pathoTitle: Scanning Tissues with a Digital Eye
home.pathoDesc: Shortening the path to accurate diagnosis with high-resolution whole-slide scanning, AI-powered tissue analysis, and digital pathology workflows.
home.applicationsSubtitle: Comprehensive solutions for cytogenetics and pathology laboratories
home.fishDesc: Automated fluorescence probe detection, signal counting, and HER2/CEP17 ratio calculation. Transforming hours of manual microscopy into seconds of precise digital analysis.
home.ctaTitle: Get in Touch for Your Projects
home.ctaSubtitle: Contact our expert team for your needs in cytogenetics and digital pathology.
home.transitionStrip2: Trusted by 100+ institutions in biomedical imaging.
home.manifestoDesc: Our AI-powered imaging systems accelerate diagnostic processes for cytogenetics and pathology specialists worldwide.
home.showcase1Desc: Automated metaphase scanning and digital karyotyping for high-throughput cytogenetics laboratories.
home.showcase2Title: Automated FISH Analysis & AI-Powered Spot Scoring
home.showcase2Desc: Intelligent fluorescence probe detection, signal counting, and ratio calculation with AI precision.
home.showcase3Title: EasyPath IMS — Digital Pathology with AI-Enhanced Analysis
home.showcase3Desc: High-resolution whole-slide imaging servers with integrated AI tools for faster, more accurate diagnosis.
home.showcase4Desc: A laboratory information system purpose-built to unify cytogenetics, FISH, and pathology under one seamless workflow.

akas.heroDesc: AI-driven chromosome analysis that transforms hours of manual microscopy into minutes of precise digital diagnostics. From slide to karyotype — fully automated.
akas.overviewDesc: AKAS is an end-to-end digital cytogenetics platform that automates the entire workflow from metaphase cell detection to final karyotype reporting. Powered by deep learning AI, it identifies metaphase spreads, captures high-resolution images, classifies all 46 chromosomes, and assembles publication-ready karyograms — with minimal human intervention.
akas.overviewHighlight1Desc: Deep learning algorithms trained on millions of chromosomes identify and classify with superhuman consistency.
akas.overviewHighlight2Desc: From slide loading to final report, every step is orchestrated automatically.
akas.overviewHighlight3Desc: Validated across hundreds of laboratories with proven diagnostic reliability.
akas.workflowStep1Desc: Motorized stage automatically scans the entire slide at low magnification, mapping all potential metaphase regions with intelligent focus algorithms.
akas.workflowStep2Desc: AI identifies and ranks the best metaphase spreads based on chromosome quality, spread morphology, and banding resolution.
akas.workflowStep3Desc: Each chromosome is segmented, classified by group and band pattern, and arranged into the standard ISCN karyogram format automatically.
akas.workflowStep4Desc: Cytogeneticists review AI-prepared karyotypes, make adjustments if needed, and generate standardized reports with a single click.
akas.feature1Desc: Queue hundreds of slides for unattended overnight scanning. Walk in to ready-made karyotypes every morning.
akas.feature2Desc: Handles overlapping and touching chromosomes with advanced contour analysis and deep learning separation.
akas.feature3Desc: Captures at 100x oil immersion with automated focus stacking for crisp G-banding detail at 400-550 band resolution.
akas.feature4Desc: Auto-generates standard ISCN notation for detected abnormalities including translocations, deletions, and inversions.
akas.feature5Desc: Seamlessly connects with hospital LIS/LIMS, shares cases across workstations, and supports HL7/DICOM protocols.
akas.feature6Desc: Full traceability with timestamped actions, digital signatures, and FDA 21 CFR Part 11 ready compliance framework.
akas.ctaTitle: Ready to Modernize Your Cytogenetics Lab?
akas.ctaDesc: See AKAS in action with a personalized demo tailored to your laboratory's workflow.

easyfish.heroDesc: Automated FISH probe detection and signal scoring that replaces tedious manual counting with instant, reproducible AI-driven results. From hybridization to report — precision at every signal.
easyfish.overviewDesc: EasyFISH is an AI-powered fluorescence in situ hybridization analysis platform that automates the entire FISH workflow — from slide scanning under fluorescence to multi-channel signal detection, automatic spot counting, ratio calculation, and standardized reporting. It eliminates observer variability and brings lab-wide consistency to every FISH case.
easyfish.overviewHighlight1Desc: Simultaneous capture across DAPI, FITC, Texas Red, Aqua, and Gold channels with automatic filter switching and exposure optimization.
easyfish.overviewHighlight2Desc: Deep learning algorithms trained on millions of FISH signals distinguish true spots from artifacts with superhuman consistency.
easyfish.overviewHighlight3Desc: Automatic HER2/CEP17, ALK, ROS1, and custom probe ratio calculation with ASCO/CAP guideline compliance.
easyfish.workflowStep1Desc: Automated stage navigates to tissue regions of interest. Multi-channel fluorescence images are captured with optimized exposure per filter — DAPI for nuclei, FITC and Texas Red for probe signals.
easyfish.workflowStep2Desc: AI identifies and segments individual nuclei from the DAPI channel, handling overlapping cells, tissue folds, and varying signal density with precision.
easyfish.workflowStep3Desc: Each fluorescence channel is analyzed independently. AI detects probe signals, filters noise and artifacts, counts spots per nucleus, and classifies signal patterns.
easyfish.workflowStep4Desc: Automatic ratio calculation per ASCO/CAP guidelines. Results are displayed in real-time with interactive galleries, and standardized reports are generated with one click.
easyfish.feature1Desc: HER2, ALK, ROS1, MET, EGFR, PDL1, and fully customizable probe configurations. Switch between panels with a single click.
easyfish.feature2Desc: Browse scored nuclei in a visual gallery. Click any nucleus to review, reclassify, or exclude — with full before/after overlays.
easyfish.feature3Desc: AI distinguishes true hybridization signals from autofluorescence, debris, and non-specific binding — reducing false positives dramatically.
easyfish.feature4Desc: Built-in guideline logic for HER2 equivocal cases, cluster detection, and chromosome enumeration probe validation.
easyfish.feature5Desc: Queue multi-slide FISH cases for unattended scanning and scoring. Review AI-prepared results when ready.
easyfish.feature6Desc: Bi-directional data flow with laboratory information systems. Auto-populate patient data, push results, and maintain full audit trails.
easyfish.ctaTitle: Bring AI Precision to Your FISH Lab
easyfish.ctaDesc: See EasyFISH transform your fluorescence analysis workflow with a personalized live demo.

easypath.heroDesc: High-resolution digital pathology with integrated AI analysis tools. From tissue scanning to diagnosis — precision at every pixel.
easypath.overviewDesc: EasyPath IMS is a comprehensive digital pathology platform that transforms glass slides into high-resolution digital images and enhances diagnostic workflows with AI-powered analysis tools. From whole-slide scanning to AI-assisted tissue classification, measurement, and reporting — it brings the full power of computational pathology to every laboratory.
easypath.overviewHighlight1Desc: Capture entire tissue sections at 0.25µm/pixel resolution with automated focus, stitching, and color calibration for diagnostic-grade images.
easypath.overviewHighlight2Desc: Deep learning algorithms detect regions of interest, classify tissue types, quantify biomarkers, and flag anomalies with consistent precision.
easypath.overviewHighlight3Desc: Organize, annotate, and share cases across departments with a unified digital archive that replaces physical slide storage.
easypath.workflowStep1Desc: Glass slides are loaded onto the high-speed scanner. Multi-layer focus and automated tissue detection produce diagnostic-quality whole-slide images in under 60 seconds.
easypath.workflowStep2Desc: Pre-trained AI models analyze digitized slides — detecting tumor regions, classifying tissue subtypes, and highlighting areas requiring pathologist attention.
easypath.workflowStep3Desc: Pathologists review AI-highlighted regions, add annotations, perform precise measurements, and compare with reference cases — all within the digital viewer.
easypath.workflowStep4Desc: Generate structured diagnostic reports with embedded annotations. Cases are archived digitally for instant retrieval, second opinions, and longitudinal tracking.
easypath.feature1Desc: Automatic multi-plane focus capture ensures every tissue plane is sharp, critical for thick sections and cytology specimens.
easypath.feature2Desc: Intelligent color normalization across different staining protocols and scanners ensures consistent image quality for AI analysis.
easypath.feature3Desc: Share cases instantly with colleagues, tumor boards, or external consultants. Real-time annotation and discussion on shared slides.
easypath.feature4Desc: Automated IHC scoring, Ki-67 quantification, PD-L1 TPS calculation, and custom biomarker algorithms with validated reproducibility.
easypath.feature5Desc: Flexible deployment options — local servers for data sovereignty or cloud infrastructure for scalability. Hybrid configurations supported.
easypath.feature6Desc: IVD-ready platform with full audit trail, role-based access control, digital signatures, and GDPR/HIPAA compliant data handling.
easypath.ctaDesc: See EasyPath IMS in action with a personalized demo tailored to your laboratory's needs.

lis.heroDesc: A purpose-built laboratory information system that connects cytogenetics, FISH, and pathology under one seamless digital workflow. From sample to report — everything in sync.
lis.overviewDesc: Our Laboratory Information System is purpose-built for pathology and cytogenetics laboratories. It unifies sample tracking, case management, result integration, and reporting into a single platform — eliminating data silos and manual handoffs. From accessioning to final sign-out, every step is tracked, traceable, and connected.
lis.overviewHighlight1Desc: Cytogenetics, FISH analysis, and anatomic pathology — all managed from a single system with shared patient records and case history.
lis.overviewHighlight2Desc: Role-based access control, encrypted data at rest and in transit, full audit logging, and regulatory compliance built into every layer.
lis.overviewHighlight3Desc: Instant response times even under heavy load. Optimized for high-throughput laboratories processing thousands of cases daily.
lis.workflowStep1Desc: Samples are accessioned with barcode scanning, patient demographics are auto-populated from HIS, and cases are created with the correct test panels and routing rules.
lis.workflowStep2Desc: Cases are automatically routed to the correct department — cytogenetics, FISH, or pathology — based on test orders. Priority and TAT rules ensure urgent cases are flagged.
lis.workflowStep3Desc: Results from AKAS, EasyFISH, and EasyPath flow directly into the patient case. AI findings, images, and measurements are consolidated into a unified view.
lis.workflowStep4Desc: Pathologists review consolidated results, add interpretations, and digitally sign reports. Finalized reports are distributed to ordering physicians via HL7, PDF, or secure portal.
lis.feature1Desc: Bi-directional interfaces with scanners, analyzers, and imaging systems. Auto-receive results and push worklists without manual data entry.
lis.feature2Desc: Drag-and-drop workflow builder adapts to your laboratory's unique processes. No two labs work the same — your LIS shouldn't either.
lis.feature3Desc: Real-time TAT monitoring, workload distribution, quality metrics, and trend analysis. Data-driven decisions for laboratory management.
lis.feature4Desc: Manage multiple laboratory locations from a single instance. Centralized configuration with site-specific customizations and shared reference data.
lis.feature5Desc: Customizable report templates with synoptic reporting, auto-populated fields, and intelligent text macros for consistent, professional reports.
lis.feature6Desc: Native support for HL7v2, HL7 FHIR, and DICOM protocols. Seamless integration with hospital information systems, EMRs, and imaging archives.
lis.ctaDesc: See how our LIS connects every part of your pathology workflow in a personalized demonstration.
